training_status: regular lifter doing fasted morning cardio

benefits.description: Finds it difficult to put on fat while on HGH
HGH preserves and grows quality dense muscle; no muscle loss noticed even during fasted cardio
HGH does not reduce appetite, allowing sufficient protein intake (1-1.5g per lb bodyweight)

protocol_notes: Has not used Mounjaro. Uses HGH for recomp/cut purposes and finds no need for GLP peptides. Prefers HGH because it does not suppress appetite unlike Mounjaro.
